chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 369 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Shahid Hussain Jogi, Advocate for the Respondents 4&5 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel appearing for respondents No.4 and 5 files a statement along with photocopy of cheque issued in favour of the Petitioner, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioner, who after going through the same submits that grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, he does not press this petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
